name: Graham Cracker Peanut Butter Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely crush the graham crackers.
2. Using an electric mixer, cream together the peanut butter and butter until soft and smooth.
3. Beat in the powdered sugar until smooth, then beat in the crushed graham crackers. Beat until well blended and moist.
4. Spread the mixture in a 13x9x2 inch pan.
5. Melt the chocolate morsels and pour over the mixture.
6. Refrigerate for 3 or 4 hours.
7. Cut into bars.
